startUrls.title: Place URLs
startUrls.description: TripAdvisor place URLs to scrape reviews from (hotels, restaurants, attractions). Must start with https://www.tripadvisor.com/

maxReviewsPerPlace.title: Max Reviews per Place
maxReviewsPerPlace.description: Maximum number of reviews to scrape per place (0 = unlimited)

startDate.title: Start Date
startDate.description: Only include reviews published on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Leave empty for all reviews. Must be on or before End Date.

endDate.title: End Date
endDate.description: Only include reviews published on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD). Leave empty for all reviews. Must be on or after Start Date.

reviewRatings.title: Review Ratings
reviewRatings.description: Only include reviews with the selected star ratings. Leave empty to include all ratings.

language.title: Review Language
language.description: Only include reviews written in this language. Leave empty for all languages.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Residential Proxy is required to bypass DataDome on Apify Cloud. Select RESIDENTIAL under Apify Proxy groups.
